sections.paragraph:
verb לבצוע

to slice, cut; break; to reach a compromise

verb להיבצע

be sliced, cut

verb לבצע

to perform, execute, accomplish; cut

verb בוצע

be performed, executed, accomplished

verb להתבצע

be performed, executed, accomplished

verb לבצע (>>ביצע)

to perform, execute, accomplish; cut

masculine noun

greed; profiteering; advantage
